description: I'm an aspiring Data Scientist with strong foundations in Python, SQL, machine learning, and data visualization, along with practical experience in real-world analytics and AI projects.

I'm passionate about extracting meaningful insights from complex datasets and building predictive models to solve business problems. Currently completing my B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering from IKGPTU.

I completed 6-month industrial training at Ducat Noida in Python, SQL, Machine Learning, and Data Analysis, working on real-world datasets and building multiple ML projects using Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, and Matplotlib.

features.title: Data Analysis Expert
features.description: Skilled in data cleaning, preprocessing, EDA, and extracting actionable insights.

features.title: ML Enthusiast
features.description: Experienced in building predictive models using regression, classification, and deep learning.

features.title: Continuous Learner
features.description: Constantly learning new techniques and tools in data science and AI.

features.title: Problem Solver
features.description: Strong analytical mindset with focus on data-driven solutions to business problems.

projects.title: AI-Based Resume Screening System
projects.description: Built an NLP-based resume screening system for automated candidate shortlisting. Matched resumes with job descriptions using machine learning algorithms.

projects.title: Credit Card Fraud Detection System
projects.description: Developed an ML model to detect fraudulent credit card transactions. Performed preprocessing and classification on imbalanced datasets with high accuracy.

projects.title: Heart Attack Risk Prediction
projects.description: Built a predictive ML model using patient health data. Applied feature engineering and classification algorithms for accurate risk prediction.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Personal portfolio site built with HTML, CSS & JavaScript. Features smooth animations, responsive layout, and modern UI design to showcase skills and projects.

education.institution: Baba Banda Singh Bahadur Engineering College, Punjab (IKGPTU)
education.description: Currently pursuing Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science & Engineering from I.K. Gujral Punjab Technical University, specializing in Data Science, Machine Learning, and AI.
Completed Higher Secondary education with 69.2% from E. Champaran, building strong analytical and mathematical foundations.
